textByHashes.6c12093874c36ecb118b4fd45782d55f7ebab968: Indeed. Apart from Morvran, I am the closest living relative of the previous Lord Iorwerth.
textByHashes.4bf5a759bc9d30b6afe981bb3b7ba9de14aa6d5c: No. That's probably for the best though. Morvran was very close to my predecessor. It would have made many uncomfortable if he had taken on the role.
textByHashes.0c7ecf3bba98f7338435d64d72d7c19173cb05d7: The others still hold a lot of mistrust for our clan. It will take a long time for those rifts to be repaired. We are on the right path though.
